task_completion.description: Open the initial base.slvs model in SolveSpace
task_completion.visual_evidence: SolveSpace application window is open displaying a 3D part, with 'base.slvs' visible in the window title bar or property browser.

task_completion.description: Change the main extrusion thickness to exactly 6.0 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: The property browser or a dimension constraint in the 3D viewport shows the extrusion thickness value set to '6.0' or '6.00'.

task_completion.description: Save the updated model as base_v2.slvs in the production directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/production/base_v2.slvs', or the SolveSpace window title updated to 'base_v2.slvs', or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists.

task_completion.description: Export the modified 3D solid as a STEP file
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog showing the filename 'base_v2.step' in the '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/production/' directory, or a file manager/terminal verifying the creation of the .step file.

task_completion.description: Export the modified 3D solid as an STL file
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog showing the filename 'base_v2.stl' in the '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/production/' directory, or a file manager/terminal verifying the creation of the .stl file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SolveSpace graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace UI (menus, property browser, 3D viewport) being actively used, rather than just terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: The thickness was modified parametrically within the CAD software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dimension constraint or extrusion property in SolveSpace explicitly shows the value '6.0' being entered or applied, rather than the agent just renaming files.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands like 'touch' to create empty files with the expected names.
integrity.visual_evidence: The STEP and STL files are generated via SolveSpace's 'Export' functionality in the GUI, not via shell commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files must be saved to the following exact paths: SLVS at '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/production/base_v2.slvs', STEP at '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/production/base_v2.step', and STL at '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/production/base_v2.stl'. The target thickness for the main extrusion must be exactly 6.0 mm (note: the initial thickness is 9.525 mm, so this is visually a thinning operation despite the task description using the word 'thickened').
